tests.name: App smoke test — catches black screen regressions renders the menu bar with View entry
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions renders the status bar footer
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions renders session rows when sessions exist
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions renders a <main> element as the top-level container
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions shows loading state before data arrives
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions shows error state when backend fails
Layout structure smoke tests renders the sidebar with plugin icons
Layout structure smoke tests renders the zone container for layout engine
Layout structure smoke tests renders the main zone with session content
Layout structure smoke tests renders sidebar, zone container, and status bar in correct order
Layout structure smoke tests status bar stays anchored at the bottom (flex-shrink: 0 in CSS)
Layout structure smoke tests session list renders inside the main zone without flicker
Notification plugin smoke tests renders a sidebar icon for the Notifications view
Notification plugin smoke tests clicking the Notifications sidebar icon shows the Notification Center view
Notification plugin smoke tests Notification Center shows empty state when no notifications
Notification plugin smoke tests Notification Center has a DND toggle button
App renders via plugin system and layout engine renders the ZoneRenderer container instead of hardcoded views
App renders via plugin system and layout engine renders session list inside the main zone via view registry
App renders via plugin system and layout engine preserves the MenuBar with View entry
App renders via plugin system and layout engine preserves the status bar footer with live metrics
App.tsx delegates view rendering to Layout Engine does not render SessionListView or EventDetailView directly in JSX
formatHeader uppercases app name and prepends v to version
formatHeader works with any app name and version
formatField formats status field
formatField formats port field with number
formatField formats sessions field with zero
formatField formats events field with zero
isEmptyState returns true when session count is zero
isEmptyState returns false when session count is greater than zero
EMPTY_STATE_MESSAGE contains the plugin install guidance message
PLUGIN_INSTALL_COMMAND contains the correct plugin install command
formatDuration formats zero seconds
formatDuration formats seconds only
formatDuration formats minutes and seconds
formatDuration formats hours minutes and seconds
formatDuration formats exact minutes with no trailing seconds
formatDuration formats exact hours
calculateDurationSeconds returns seconds between two ISO timestamps
calculateDurationSeconds returns zero when start equals end
calculateDurationSeconds returns null when ended_at is null
formatSessionTimestamp formats ISO timestamp to readable local format
deriveStatus returns Listening when latest session is null
deriveStatus returns Listening when latest session has ended
deriveStatus returns Active session when latest session has no ended_at
deriveConnectionStatus returns 'No plugin connected' when 0 sessions and 0 events
deriveConnectionStatus returns 'Listening' when sessions exist but no active session
deriveConnectionStatus returns 'Active session' when latest session has no ended_at
deriveConnectionStatus returns 'Listening' when events exist but no latest session
deriveConnectionStatus never returns 'No plugin connected' once events exist
isSessionActive — boundary mutant killers returns false when now - lastEventTime equals exactly STALE_SESSION_MS (5 min boundary)
isSessionActive — boundary mutant killers returns true when now - lastEventTime is one millisecond below STALE_SESSION_MS
deriveConnectionStatus — compound condition mutant killers returns session-level status when sessions exist but events are zero
formatActiveTooltip shows app name and version when listening
formatActiveTooltip includes event count when active
formatActiveTooltip includes event count of zero when active
cross-component event type consistency CANONICAL_EVENT_TYPES contains exactly the six expected snake_case types
cross-component event type consistency CANONICAL_EVENT_TYPES has exactly six entries
cross-component event type consistency hook port matches expected value
formatCanonicalEventType converts snake_case event type to uppercase label
formatCanonicalEventType converts session_start to uppercase label
formatCanonicalEventType converts session_end to uppercase label
formatCanonicalEventType converts tool_call_end to uppercase label
formatCanonicalEventType converts agent_complete to uppercase label
formatCanonicalEventType converts prompt_submit to uppercase label
formatCanonicalEventType prefixes unrecognized event types with UNKNOWN
formatCanonicalEventType prefixes empty string with UNKNOWN
extractToolName extracts tool name from tool_call_start payload
extractToolName extracts tool name from tool_call_end payload
extractToolName returns null for non-tool events even when payload has a tool field
extractToolName returns null when payload has no tool field
extractToolName returns null when payload is not an object
extractToolName returns null when payload is null for a tool event
extractToolName extracts tool_name field as fallback
formatEventTimestamp formats ISO timestamp to time-only string
formatPayloadSnippet returns truncated JSON string for large payloads
formatPayloadSnippet returns full JSON for small payloads
formatPayloadSnippet returns empty object string for empty payload
formatPayloadSnippet handles null payload
formatPayloadSnippet returns full JSON when length equals exactly maxLength (boundary)
formatEventLabel returns uppercase type for non-tool events
formatEventLabel appends tool name for tool_call_start events
formatEventLabel appends tool name for tool_call_end events
formatEventLabel omits tool name when not extractable
User opens newly installed app and sees guidance to connect status is 'No plugin connected' with 0 sessions and 0 events
User opens newly installed app and sees guidance to connect empty state is detected when session count is zero
User opens newly installed app and sees guidance to connect status field formats correctly for display
App transitions to active when plugin sends first event status transitions from empty to 'Active session' on first event
Status derivation rules status is 'No plugin connected' when 0 sessions and 0 events
Status derivation rules status is 'Listening' when sessions exist but none are active
Status derivation rules status is 'Active session' when the latest session is ongoing
Status derivation rules status never returns to 'No plugin connected' once events exist
Empty state displays the plugin install command the plugin install command string is correct
Empty state does not show error indicators receiver port is reported as 3748
Historical data accessible without plugin sessions with data show 'Listening' not 'No plugin connected'
Receiver stays ready even when no plugin is connected receiver port is constant regardless of plugin state
App handles zero-to-one session transition correctly after first session starts, status becomes 'Active session'
isSessionActive returns true when ended_at is null and last event is recent
isSessionActive returns false when ended_at is a timestamp
isSessionActive returns false when ended_at is null but last event is stale (>2 min)
isSessionActive returns false when last_event_at is null
sortSessionsMostRecentFirst returns empty array for empty input
sortSessionsMostRecentFirst returns single session unchanged
sortSessionsMostRecentFirst sorts sessions by started_at descending
sortSessionsMostRecentFirst does not mutate the original array
formatSessionDuration returns elapsed time for an open session
formatSessionDuration returns formatted duration for a completed session
formatSessionDuration returns '0s' when start and end are equal
formatSessionDuration returns hours for long sessions
deriveStatusLabel returns 'Active' when session is active
deriveStatusLabel returns 'Completed' when session is not active
deriveStatusClass returns 'status-active' when session is active
deriveStatusClass returns 'status-completed' when session is not active
deriveSessionRowClass returns 'srow live-s' when session is active
deriveSessionRowClass returns 'srow' when session is not active
deriveSessionDotClass returns 'sdot live' when session is active
deriveSessionDotClass returns 'sdot done' when session is not active
